message:
feat(webgpu): add GPU-accelerated vector search with top-K selection

Implements GPU-accelerated distance computation and top-K selection:
- vector_distance.wgsl: cosine, L2, dot product with shared memory opt
- topk_select.wgsl: partial bitonic sort for O(K log N) top-K
- GPUVectorSearch class with CPU fallback for small datasets
- Thresholds: 5,000+ vectors (distance), 10,000+ scores (top-K)

Integrates with vectorSearch() method for end-to-end GPU acceleration.
Adds 2 Playwright tests covering all distance metrics and edge cases.
